description: Self-hosted RAG chatbot answering WoW Classic questions strictly grounded in wowhead content. API-first (frontend later). Configurable persona/style. Local Ollama LLM, pgvector store, multilingual bge-m3 embeddings.

stack.llm: Local only via Ollama (default model: qwen2.5:7b-instruct)

principles: Grounded-only answers: respond solely from retrieved context.
Explicit abstention when evidence is insufficient ('no hay evidencia suficiente en los docs').
Always return source citations (wowhead URLs) with answers.
Every component behind a swappable interface (LLM, embeddings, vector store, persona).
No secrets in code; configuration is external.

features.title: Project skeleton & configuration system
features.acceptance: src/ package layout exists; pydantic-settings loads config from env + files; persona/style configs are loadable and swappable; requirements.txt is pinned; init.sh sets up venv, installs deps, runs pytest green.

features.title: Document model + local corpus loader
features.acceptance: A Document schema (text + metadata: source_url, title, section) and a loader that reads a local corpus directory. Real wowhead scraping is deferred to a later feature.

features.title: Chunking pipeline
features.acceptance: Documents split into overlapping chunks preserving metadata and a stable chunk id; configurable size/overlap.

features.title: Embeddings provider (abstraction + bge-m3)
features.acceptance: EmbeddingProvider interface with a bge-m3 implementation; batch embedding; deterministic dimension; unit-testable via a fake provider.

features.title: Vector store (abstraction + pgvector) and indexing
features.acceptance: VectorStore interface; pgvector-backed implementation with schema migration; upsert chunks+embeddings+metadata; similarity search; indexing pipeline that ingests a corpus end-to-end.

features.title: Retriever
features.acceptance: Query -> embedding -> top-k retrieval with scores and metadata; configurable k and score threshold used for abstention signaling.

features.title: Prompt builder: persona/style + grounding + citations
features.acceptance: Builds a system+user prompt injecting persona/style (simple, Orc, Troll, ...) and strict grounding instructions; formats retrieved context with citation markers; persona selected by config.

features.title: LLM provider abstraction + Ollama
features.acceptance: LLMProvider interface with an Ollama implementation (local HTTP); model configurable; unit-testable via a fake provider.

features.title: RAG orchestrator + abstention logic
features.acceptance: Ties retrieve -> prompt -> generate; abstains with a clear message when retrieval is below threshold; returns answer + source citations + metadata (model, persona, scores).

features.title: HTTP API (FastAPI)
features.acceptance: POST /ask returns {answer, sources, abstained, metadata}; health endpoint; CORS configured for a future in-game frontend; persona selectable per-request or via config.

features.title: Evaluation harness (golden Q&A, faithfulness, abstention)
features.acceptance: Golden Q&A dataset; metrics for retrieval hit-rate, answer faithfulness/groundedness, and correct abstention on out-of-corpus questions; runnable as a script/report.

features.title: [LATER] Wowhead ingestion / scraper
features.acceptance: Deferred. Fetches and normalizes wowhead content into the Document schema, respecting robots/rate limits.

features.title: [LATER] Reranking
features.acceptance: Deferred. Cross-encoder reranker to improve top-k ordering before generation.
